results.title: Show's axing gags media: PP
results.description: The People's Party (PP) on Monday raised concerns that the axing of the long-running TV programme Inside Thailand, which will cease broadcasting on MCOT's 9 HD channel on June 30, may amount to silencing the press.

results.title: Bonnie Tyler's Health Crisis: Singer, 75, Wakes From Coma But 'Remains Seriously Ill' After Suffering Cardiac Arrest
results.description: Bonnie Tyler woke up after a five week coma, which she was placed in after complications from stomach surgery.
